page.name: Groove
page.pad1: sampler_play 1 ? on & sampler_used 1 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0.5 & sampler_stop 1 : on & sampler_stop 1 : off & sampler_used 0 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0 & sampler_play 1 & sampler_select 1 : sampler_play 1 & sampler_select 1
page.pad2: sampler_play 2 ? on & sampler_used 1 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0.5 & sampler_stop 2 : on & sampler_stop 2 : off & sampler_used 0 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0 & sampler_play 2 & sampler_select 2 : sampler_play 2 & sampler_select 2
page.pad3: sampler_play 3 ? on & sampler_used 1 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0.5 & sampler_stop 3 : on & sampler_stop 3 : off & sampler_used 0 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0 & sampler_play 3 & sampler_select 3 : sampler_play 3 & sampler_select 3
page.pad4: sampler_play 4 ? on & sampler_used 1 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0.5 & sampler_stop 4 : on & sampler_stop 4 : off & sampler_used 0 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0 & sampler_play 4 & sampler_select 4 : sampler_play 4 & sampler_select 4
page.pad5: sampler_play 5 ? on & sampler_used 1 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0.5 & sampler_stop 5 : on & sampler_stop 5 : off & sampler_used 0 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0 & sampler_play 5 & sampler_select 5 : sampler_play 5 & sampler_select 5
page.pad6: sampler_play 6 ? on & sampler_used 1 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0.5 & sampler_stop 6 : on & sampler_stop 6 : off & sampler_used 0 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0 & sampler_play 6 & sampler_select 6 : sampler_play 6 & sampler_select 6
page.pad7: sampler_play 7 ? on & sampler_used 1 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0.5 & sampler_stop 7 : on & sampler_stop 7 : off & sampler_used 0 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0 & sampler_play 7 & sampler_select 7 : sampler_play 7 & sampler_select 7
page.pad8: sampler_play 8 ? on & sampler_used 1 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0.5 & sampler_stop 8 : on & sampler_stop 8 : off & sampler_used 0 ? stem 'FullRhythm' 0 & sampler_play 8 & sampler_select 8 : sampler_play 8 & sampler_select 8
